Clothing.opener: Hi there -- welcome in. What are you shopping for today?
Are you looking for something casual or something more formal today?
Would you like to see some tops or some bottoms first?
What size do you usually wear in this brand?
How did that one fit when you tried it on?
If this fit isn't quite right, what would you like me to bring instead?
If you'd like to try it on, we can do that first.
Are you looking for the same style you saw before, or something else?
Do you want this in the same style, or would you prefer a different look?
Let me check whether we still have that available for you.
I can look in the back and in the system for your size.
If we don't have it here, would you want me to see whether another location has it?
If it's not here today, we may still be able to get it for you.
I can hold it for you if you want to come back later.
Would you like me to explain the price on this item?
This one may be on sale depending on the promotion.
Some offers only work under certain conditions.
Do you already have a membership with us, or would you need to sign up?
If the register shows something different, I can double-check it for you.
I can compare the sign and the tag if the price seems off.
Before we continue, would this be a return or an exchange?
For returns, the result can depend on the receipt and the store policy.
Do you have the receipt with you today?
Let me see whether this return still falls within the return window.
If you'd like, I can ask the manager whether an exception is possible.
Are you ready to head to the register with this item?
The total will come up once I scan everything for you.
Go ahead and tap, insert, or swipe whenever you're ready to pay for your clothing.
If that card doesn't work, do you have another way you'd like to pay?
Would you like a bag for your clothes today?
I can fold everything and pack it up for you.
Thanks for waiting -- it's a bit busy in here right now.
We're open right now, but some services may take a few minutes.
For this item, I may need to see an ID before I complete the sale.
If the alarm goes off, don't worry -- I'll check the tag.
Sometimes the security tag doesn't come off properly at checkout.
If the barcode doesn't scan, I'll enter it another way.
It looks like the register is having a small issue right now.
Okay, I fixed part of it -- can you check whether that looks right now?
I want to make sure you leave with the correct size today.
I can bring you another one so you can compare the fit.
Would you like to keep this one, or should I switch it out for you?
If this is a return, the refunded amount may not be the full original amount.
If the item has a defect, I may be able to exchange it for you here.
This register is closed, but I can take you to one that's open.
Before you pay, do you want me to check the final price with your coupon?
This coupon may only work today, depending on the promotion.
Are you shopping from the new season, or just browsing today?
If you're deciding between brands, I can help you compare them.
Before you buy it, would you like to know how this fabric behaves after washing?

Groceries.opener: Hi -- I can help you right here. Are you ready to check out?
Go ahead and place your items here whenever you're ready.
I'll start scanning these for you now.
If a price looks wrong, just let me know and I'll check it.
Sometimes the sale only works under certain conditions.
If this item doesn't show up, I'll verify it for you.
If the shelf sign looked different, I can call someone to confirm it.
I can fix the price if the system entered it incorrectly.
Once I'm done scanning, I'll give you the total.
Do you want to pay all together or another way?
You can insert, swipe, or tap your card when you're ready.
If the machine asks, go ahead and enter your PIN.
If the payment doesn't go through, we can try a different method.
Would you like your change and receipt back?
Do you need a bag for your groceries today?
I can separate cold items from the dry ones for you.
How many of these did you want today?
If I scanned something twice, tell me and I'll remove it.
If something here isn't yours, we can fix that now.
Thanks for waiting -- the line is moving a little slowly today.
For that item, I may need to check your ID first.
I just need to verify your age for this purchase.
Are you buying mostly food today, or do you also have restricted items?
If you have just a few items, I can ring you through quickly.
Would you like everything packed in bags, or do you have your own?
This lane is open now if you're ready to come forward.
If you need exact change, I can tell you the total first.
If your card is declined, we can try it again.
If the barcode is missing, I may need to enter it manually.
If this produce needs weighing, I can do that here.
If the label doesn't match, I'll update the price.
Try the card one more time for me, please.
If this register keeps acting up, I may send you to the main checkout.
That sale may have ended already, but I'll take a look.
For produce, was this priced by weight or by item?
If the weight seems off, we can check it again.
If the package is open or damaged, I can call someone over.
If you'd rather not take this one, I can help with a replacement.
The refund can usually go back to the original payment method.
Hi -- next in line, please.
Would you like me to keep the eggs and other fragile items separate?
I can bag the heavy items differently if you want.
If you want to split the payment, tell me before I finish the sale.
Please keep your receipt in case you need to come back.
If something on the screen doesn't look right, tell me before you pay.
I can print the receipt or leave it out if you prefer.
If you're using cash, I can take that whenever you're ready.
This checkout is for customers who are ready to pay now.
If the scanner doesn't read it, I'll type it in.
Alright, let's get these groceries taken care of for you.

Banking.opener: Good morning -- how can I help you with your banking today?
Are you here about an account, a card, or something else today?
I can look up your account once I verify a few details.
Would you like me to check your balance for you?
Is this about your debit card, your credit card, or another card?
If your card isn't working, I can see what's happening.
Do you have the account number with you, or should I look it up another way?
Are you asking about a transfer in or a transfer out?
If a transfer hasn't arrived yet, I can review the record with you.
If you have a receipt or confirmation, I can take a look at it.
I can review the recent activity on the account with you now.
If you don't recognize a charge, tell me which one concerns you.
If this looks suspicious, we can block the card and take the next step.
I can help reactivate or replace the card depending on the issue.
Did a payment go through, get declined, or stay pending?
What amount are you trying to move or pay today?
Would you like to make a deposit or a withdrawal?
Are you trying to do this here at the branch or at the ATM?
If the transaction failed, the reason may be available funds.
Are you interested in opening a new account today?
If so, I can explain the different account types we offer.
Some accounts include fees and some don't, depending on the conditions.
If fees are your concern, I can walk you through that.
Would you like information about credit or a loan today?
If you're applying, I can explain what stage the application is in.
We may need a few documents before we can continue.
If something is missing, I can tell you exactly what we still need.
Our system is a bit slow right now, but I can still check.
If needed, I can open a case and give you the reference number.
Some requests take a few days for review.
If you prefer, you can also follow up later by phone.
Before I continue, I need to verify your identity.
Can you confirm your birth date and current address for me?
If any of your contact details changed, I can update them now.
I can send a security code to your phone or email.
Once you receive it, please read the code back to me or enter it there.
If the code doesn't work, I can send a new one.
Is the main issue that you can't access your account right now?
If so, I can help with access recovery or a reset.
If the problem stays the same after that, we may need another step.
I know this can be frustrating -- I'll explain each part clearly.
If anything I say is unclear, stop me and I'll repeat it more slowly.
Do you need help here at this branch, or were you sent from another one?
If you'd prefer, I can ask one of our advisors to speak with you.
If the signature doesn't match what we have on file, I'll need to review that.
Are you asking about an international transfer today?
If so, I can explain the exchange rate and the transfer fee.
Some incoming funds may be placed on hold for a period of time.
Tell me what happened, and we'll figure out the next step together.
How can I help you today?

Airport.opener: Good morning -- welcome. May I see your passport, please?
Do you already have a reservation, or do you need help finding it?
If you have the confirmation, I can pull up the booking for you.
Is the booking under your first name and last name exactly as on the passport?
Before we continue, I'll need to check your travel documents.
Are you flying today on this airline all the way through?
Is your final destination this city, or do you have a connection after that?
Are you on a direct flight today, or a connecting itinerary?
I can confirm whether your next flight leaves today or tomorrow.
Your departure and arrival details will appear on the itinerary once I open it.
The gate may change later, so please keep checking the screens.
If it hasn't been assigned yet, it should appear closer to boarding.
Do you have a seat already, or would you like me to review the options with you?
Would you prefer a window, an aisle, or whatever is still available?
If you're traveling together, I can see whether there are seats side by side.
I may be able to move the seat depending on availability.
Will you be checking any bags today?
Please place your suitcase on the scale for me.
I'll need to verify the size and weight of the bag.
If the bag is over the limit, I'll explain the options.
If it's too heavy, you may need to remove a few things.
Some items should stay with you instead of going in the suitcase.
Are you carrying any liquids, batteries, medication, or valuables today?
That item may need additional review before I can accept the bag.
If security requires it, they may do an extra inspection.
If your bag is fine, I'll tag it and give you the baggage receipt.
Please keep that receipt until you arrive.
If there's a fee, you can pay by card or cash here at the counter.
I can print your boarding pass, or send it to your phone if available.
If you're traveling with family, I can check whether preboarding applies.
If you have a child or a stroller, let me know now.
Depending on the airport, you may be able to take the stroller to the gate.

words: pasa algunas cosas a la mochila
no puede ir en la maleta
Airport.opener: If the flight is full, seat changes may be limited.
If the system isn't responding, please give me a moment.
If there's no space in the cabin, we may need to check the bag.
If your connection is short, I can note that on the record.
If you have a long connection, I can show you where the next step is.
After check-in, you'll go through security first.
Depending on your route, you may also pass through immigration or customs.
If you need a customs form, I can tell you where to get it.
Are you checking only one bag, or do you have a second one as well?
If something isn't allowed in checked luggage, I'll let you know now.
If you'd like, I can explain where to go after this counter.
Please make sure the name on the booking matches the document exactly.
If there's any mismatch, we need to address it before boarding.
Would you like me to confirm the boarding time for you as well?
Your gate isn't final yet, so keep an eye on the app and the screens.
I'll finish printing everything for you now.
Once we're done here, you'll be ready to continue to security.
How can I help you with your check-in today?

Restaurant.opener: Hi there -- welcome. Do you already have a reservation today?
How many people are dining with us?
Would you prefer a table inside or outside?
Here you go -- take a look at the menu whenever you're ready.
Can I answer any questions before you order?
Are you thinking about an appetizer, a main dish, or both?
If you'd like, I can recommend something popular.
Do you eat meat, or would you prefer something vegetarian or vegan?
Do you have any allergies or ingredients you need us to avoid?
If a dish is too spicy, we may be able to adjust it.
Would you like something to drink while you decide?
Still water, sparkling water, or something else?
If you'd like alcohol, I can tell you what we have by the glass or bottle.
The kitchen is a bit busy tonight, but I'll put your order in right away.
If something doesn't arrive, let me know and I'll check on it.
If there was a mistake with the order, I'll help fix it.
I can ask the kitchen to remake that if needed.
Was the food temperature okay for you?
If you'd like, I can explain exactly what comes in that dish.
If you need me to repeat that more slowly, just tell me.
Are you still waiting on anything else for the table?
Would you like more of the same, or something different this time?
Do you need anything extra with the meal?
When you're finished, I can bring the bill.
If you'd like to split the bill, tell me before I run the payment.
You can pay by card or cash here.
If the card terminal gives an error, we can try again.
Would you like a receipt or an invoice with the payment?
If you want dessert, I can bring that menu next.
If you're in a hurry, I can check the wait time with the kitchen.
We do have a waitlist if all the tables are occupied right now.
Would a quieter table work better for you?
If you'd like, I can move you to another table when one opens.
Do you need more utensils or napkins?
Would you like another drink with ice or without ice?
If you're taking something home, I can package it to go.
Would you like the dish for sharing, or as individual portions?
I can clear these plates whenever you're done.
Please be careful -- this plate is still hot.
If something tastes off, tell me and I'll take care of it.
Our service charge may already be included depending on the bill.
If you have any question about the total, I can explain it.
We can do the whole payment now whenever you're ready.
Would you like another round before I bring the bill?
The table is ready now, so you can follow me.
If the dining room is full, I can add your name to the list.
Take your time with the menu -- I'll come back in a moment.
What can I get started for you today?
Good evening -- welcome in.
Are you ready to order, or do you need another minute?

Small Talk with a Neighbour.opener: Hey, nice to meet you -- are you new to the building?
Do you live in this apartment building too, or nearby?
How are you finding the neighborhood so far?
I wanted to mention something small from last night.
Was there a gathering at your place yesterday evening?
I work early, so I just wanted to check in about the noise.
If something like that happens again, would you mind letting me know ahead of time?
By the way, I think there may have been an issue with the parking spot.
I saw a car in that space earlier and wanted to ask about it.
If it was just a mix-up, no problem at all.
I think a package may have been delivered to the wrong door.
Does this name belong to someone in your unit?
I've had deliveries go missing before, so I wanted to ask right away.
How long have you been living here, by the way?
Do you like it here overall?
I've noticed the place is usually pretty quiet.
Have you had any issues with water or leaks in your unit?
I already contacted building management, but they haven't come yet.
If it gets worse, it may need attention sooner rather than later.
If anything changes, just let me know.
Do you live on this floor too, or upstairs?
I've been trying to figure out where the sound is coming from.
Any chance I could borrow a tool from you for a minute?
I just need something simple for a quick fix.
Do you know where trash and recycling go in this building?
Has the elevator been acting up for you too?
I wasn't sure whether the front entrance was working properly.
Do you happen to have a spare key or know who manages that?
Was that your visitor at the door earlier?
Are you expecting anyone today?
It looked like someone might be moving in.
I saw a moving truck outside and got curious.
Your dog is cute -- what's their name?
Does your pet usually go out around this time?
If you ever need help watering plants, let me know.
Do you use the balcony much in this weather?
It feels cold in this hallway today, doesn't it?
Has your power gone out at all recently?
I was wondering whether the water outage affected your unit too.
By the way, welcome if you're the new neighbor everyone mentioned.
Have you been here long, or did you just arrive recently?
Have you heard anything about the rent going up again?
If management still doesn't answer, someone may need to file a complaint.
I keep hearing noise from above and can't tell which unit it is.
Do you ever use the back entrance, or just the main one?
I think the mailbox area may have mixed up some deliveries again.
If any mail for me shows up by mistake, I'd appreciate it.
Sorry to bother you -- I just had a quick question.
Hey -- do you have a minute?
Hope I'm not interrupting anything.

Construction Contractor.opener: Morning -- can we go over where the project stands today?
Before you start, I want to confirm the plan and the design.
Can you walk me through the estimate one more time?
I want to understand the budget before we move forward.
Tell me what the deposit covers and what the final payment covers.
Have all the materials arrived, or is anything still missing?
If something isn't available yet, what does that change for the schedule?
Why is the job running behind at this point?
Are you still expecting to finish on time?
What's the current timeline from here?
If there's a delay, I need to know whether you finish today or later.
Has the work already started, or is part of it still paused?
Can you check this section with me right now?
I want to understand whether this is an adjustment or a bigger change.
Is this the same quality we discussed originally?
If there's a better option, explain the tradeoff to me.
If it costs more, I need to know why.
Was that additional cost included in the original budget or not?
Please explain exactly what happened here.
I need more detail before I approve anything else.
Can you show me the plan and send me a copy afterward?
Is this part finished, or is more work still missing?
I'm looking at this area now -- is this considered complete?
This doesn't look right to me. How are you going to fix it?
If something needs to be redone, I want that clear now.
Let's look at the wall, floor, and ceiling together.
Why are there marks in the finish here?
Is this surface actually level?
I see a crack and I want to know what caused it.
There's moisture here -- where is it coming from?
If there's a leak inside the wall, what has to happen next?
Do you need to open the wall, or can you solve it another way?
I want to avoid any extra damage if possible.
If this is urgent, tell me clearly how serious it is.
Do not make any change unless I approve it first.
I need better communication before anything else happens on this job.
No one came when expected -- what's the reason?
So are people coming today or tomorrow?
If they come, what time should I expect them?
Please do not arrive late without telling me first.
Will you still meet the deadline we discussed?
What happens between delivery, final inspection, and final handoff?
Does this work come with a warranty?
Before you continue, show me what tools or equipment you'll be using.
Walk me through what you're installing in this area.
Will you clean the site and remove the debris when you're done?
I also need to know about access, dust, and noise for the neighbors.
What safety measures are in place while this work is happening?
If you change materials, I need to know whether you're using tile, wood, or something else.
Do we need a permit or an inspector involved for this part?

Mechanic.opener: Hi -- tell me what the car is doing.
When did you first notice the problem?
Does it happen when you start the car, while driving, or both?
Is the issue more about the engine, the battery, or the brakes?
Have you noticed any unusual noise, vibration, or leaking?
Does it fail to start completely, or does it start and then shut off?
Any smell, overheating, or loss of power?
If it's using oil or losing fluid, I need to know that too.
How do the brakes feel when you press them?
I'll inspect the car and see what turns up.
If needed, I can start with a diagnosis before any repair.
After I check it, I'll tell you what repair I recommend.
Would you like me to look specifically at the engine or the brakes first?
Do you want a basic inspection, or a more complete diagnosis?
I can give you the estimated price before I begin any work.
The total depends on labor, parts, and whether anything extra shows up.
I can write up a quote so you can decide first.
How would you want to pay if we go ahead with the repair?
I'll let you know if any part looks worn or damaged.
If something is loose, broken, or unsafe, I'll point it out.
Some repairs are urgent and some can wait -- I'll separate them for you.
This may involve the brake system or the electrical system.
I'll check the fluid levels while it's here.
Has the check-engine light been on?
If there are codes stored, I'll scan them.
Will you be leaving the car with us today?
If we finish, do you want to pick it up later today or tomorrow?
I can give you a rough time estimate once I inspect it.
If the repair comes out too expensive, I can tell you the priority items first.
If you'd rather do only the most necessary repair, that's fine.
I won't do extra work without your approval.
If anything new appears, I'll explain it before moving forward.
Are you noticing this with the brake fluid, oil, or coolant?
What kind of fuel does the vehicle take?
Does it happen while braking, accelerating, or just cruising?
Is it worse when the car is cold or hot?
Do you feel it more at low speed or high speed?
Does it happen in turns, uphill, or downhill?
I'm the mechanic looking at it today, and I'll keep you updated.
If a part is under warranty, I'll let you know.
Are you here for a repair, routine service, or maintenance?
If you have service history, that can help me narrow it down.
If you want, I can do a full diagnosis instead of guessing.
If my explanation isn't clear, stop me and I'll say it another way.
Do you want me to show you the worn brake parts if that's the issue?
I may also need to check the steering, alignment, or suspension.
If it's a manual, tell me whether the clutch feels different.
If there's noise from underneath, I may inspect the exhaust too.
I'll check the air filter while I'm in there.
Let's start with the symptoms and go from there.

Police Traffic Stop.opener: Good afternoon. Please keep your hands visible and roll down the window.
I stopped you because I need to check something with the vehicle.
May I see your driver's license, registration, and proof of insurance, please?
If those documents are in the glove compartment, tell me before you reach for them.
Do you know why I pulled you over today?
Do you know what the speed limit is in this area?
I observed the vehicle moving above the limit.
This stop may also relate to the condition of the vehicle.
I need to speak with you about your lights and your plate.
Were you wearing your seatbelt while driving?
Please turn off the engine and remain in the vehicle for now.
Move slowly and follow my instructions.
I need to ask about your driving just before the stop.
Did you change lanes without signaling back there?
Tell me where you were coming from and where you're headed.
How long have you been driving today?
Is this your vehicle, or are you driving a rental or borrowed car?
If it's a rental, do you have the rental agreement with you?
Have you had anything to drink today?
I need you to answer clearly so I know whether further testing is required.
If necessary, I may ask you to do a breath test.
I'll be checking the registration and insurance in the system now.
If something doesn't appear in the database, I'll tell you in a moment.
Depending on what I find, this may be a warning or a citation.
If a ticket is issued, I'll explain the amount and the deadline.
You would be able to handle payment online in most cases.
This happened on a public road within a marked zone.
I need to know whether you saw the sign or signal back there.
Was there a reason for the lane change or the hard braking?
Do you have the physical document, or only a copy on your phone?
If it's on your phone, tell me before you pick it up.
If the document won't load, let me know right away.
If a document is expired, that changes how I handle the stop.
If something is not valid, I need to note that.
If you don't understand me, say so and I'll repeat it more slowly.
Do you understand what I'm telling you so far?
At the end of the stop, I'll tell you whether this is a warning or a ticket.
Do not leave until I tell you the stop is finished.
Please pull farther onto the shoulder and activate your hazard lights.
If this becomes more serious, I may ask you to step out of the vehicle.
If there has been an accident, I also need a statement.
I may need names for any witnesses if there were any.
If paperwork is required, I will tell you where to sign.
If there is a court date, it will appear on the citation.
Do you need a tow truck, or is the vehicle drivable?
Stay calm and listen carefully to each instruction.
This is a routine traffic stop, so let's keep everything simple.
I'm going to ask a few direct questions and then we'll sort this out.
For now, remain where you are.
Let's start with your license, please.
